picks.excerpt: Machine-learning writing tools can scaffold drafting, structure and editing for neurodiverse authors who find the blank page a barrier - but the piece weighs whether leaning on AI risks blurring authorship and disclosure norms. A craft-and-ethics look at who AI writing assistance is really for.

Rakuten Kobo's native StoryGraph integration is now live across its e-readers, auto-syncing reading history and progress and plugging readers into StoryGraph's AI-driven, mood-based recommendation engine - positioned as the anti-Goodreads, anti-Amazon discovery layer for books, Kobo Plus and library loans.
